nasb.text: The man said to Eli, “I am the one who came from the battle line. Indeed, I escaped from the battle line today.” And he said, “How did things go, my son?”

esv.text: And the man said to Eli, “I am he who has come from the battle; I fled from the battle today.” And he said, “How did it go, my son?”

cnv.text: 那人告訴以利：“我是從戰場上來的，今天從戰場上逃回來。”以利問：“我兒，事情怎麼樣？”

ccb.text: 报信的人对以利说：“我今天是从战场逃回来的。”以利问：“我的孩子，情况怎么样？”
